items.name: Bike Chain
items.description: Linked metal plates transfer pedal force to the rear wheel.

items.name: Inner Tube
items.description: An air-filled rubber tube that supports the tire from inside.

items.name: Patch Kit
items.description: Small patches and adhesive seal safe, repairable tube punctures.

items.name: Tire Lever
items.description: A curved lever helps lift the tire bead off the rim without yanking.

items.name: Air Pump
items.description: A pump adds air pressure so tires can roll safely and efficiently.

items.name: Multi-Tool
items.description: A compact tool set with bike-sized drivers and hex keys.

items.name: Chain Lube
items.description: Lubricant reduces friction after a chain has been cleaned.

items.name: Brake Pads
items.description: Friction pads press against a rim or rotor to slow the bike.

items.name: Spoke
items.description: A thin tensioned rod helps a wheel stay round and strong.

items.name: Gear Cable
items.description: A steel cable carries hand force from the shifter to the derailleur.

items.name: Copper Ore
items.description: A mineral rock that can become conductive copper for wires.

items.name: Iron Ore
items.description: A heavy ore that can be refined into strong iron or steel parts.

items.name: Wood Plank
items.description: A light structural material that is strong along its grain.

items.name: Rubber Strip
items.description: A flexible strip useful for grips, tires, seals, and vibration control.

items.name: Metal Strip
items.description: A bendable strip used for brackets, reinforcement, and repairs.

items.name: Glass Shard
items.description: A brittle transparent piece that teaches why sharp materials can puncture tires.

items.name: Silica
items.description: A mineral ingredient used in glass, electronics, and some composite materials.

items.name: Turquoise
items.description: A blue-green mineral often associated with copper-rich geology.

items.name: Aluminum Scrap
items.description: A lightweight metal scrap useful when low weight matters.

items.name: Steel Bolt
items.description: A strong threaded fastener for holding loaded parts together.

items.name: Agave Fiber
items.description: Tough plant fiber that shows how living structures can reinforce materials.

items.name: Yucca Fiber
items.description: Strong desert fiber useful for rope, baskets, and composite lessons.

items.name: Mesquite Pod
items.description: A protein-rich pod that links desert trees to food webs.

items.name: Creosote Leaves
items.description: Waxy leaves that demonstrate water conservation and plant chemistry.

items.name: Prickly Pear Fruit
items.description: A water-rich cactus fruit that feeds wildlife and people when harvested carefully.

items.name: Jojoba Bean
items.description: A seed containing stable wax useful for protective coatings.

items.name: Barrel Cactus Fruit
items.description: A desert fruit that teaches emergency resources and plant adaptation.

items.name: Ocotillo Flower
items.description: A bright flower that appears when the ocotillo has enough water to bloom.

items.name: Cholla Bud
items.description: A cactus bud that shows how desert plants store resources seasonally.

items.name: Desert Lavender
items.description: An aromatic desert plant used to discuss scent, pollinators, and plant compounds.

items.name: Water Sample
items.description: A labeled sample used to measure pH, clarity, and signs of life.

items.name: Algae Sample
items.description: A green sample that can indicate nutrients, sunlight, and water conditions.

items.name: Microbial Sample
items.description: A tiny-life sample for learning how microbes affect ecosystems and production.

items.name: Plant Sample
items.description: A small plant tissue sample for observation and careful biology work.

items.name: Soil Sample
items.description: A field sample that can reveal moisture, minerals, and living organisms.

items.name: Macroinvertebrate
items.description: A small visible water animal used as an indicator of stream health.

items.name: Water Test Strip
items.description: A color-changing strip for estimating water chemistry such as pH.

items.name: pH Chart
items.description: A color chart for matching test strips to acidity or basicity.

items.name: Pickaxe
items.description: A mining tool for breaking loose rock safely in supervised areas.

items.name: Hard Hat
items.description: Protective headgear that teaches safety before exploration.

items.name: Lantern
items.description: A portable light for seeing hazards and details in dark spaces.

items.name: Field Guide
items.description: A reference book for comparing observations with known species.

items.name: Binoculars
items.description: A viewing tool for observing wildlife from a respectful distance.

items.name: Water Kit
items.description: A sampling kit for collecting, labeling, and testing water safely.

items.name: Clipboard
items.description: A writing board for keeping field notes organized outdoors.

items.name: Magnifying Glass
items.description: A lens that helps inspect small textures, fibers, insects, and cracks.

items.name: Tire
items.description: A finished rubber tire ready to grip the road and protect the tube.

items.name: Ready Inner Tube
items.description: An inspected tube that is patched, inflated, and ready for installation.

items.name: Chain Link
items.description: A replacement link for repairing a broken or stiff bike chain.

items.name: Battery Cell
items.description: A simulated cell for learning how stored chemical energy powers circuits.

items.name: Refined Copper
items.description: Purified copper that conducts electricity better than rough ore.

items.name: Carbon Rod
items.description: A carbonized rod used to explore electrodes and material structure.

items.name: Rubber Sheet
items.description: A flexible sheet useful for seals, pads, and tire-related crafting.

items.name: Fiber Rope
items.description: Twisted plant fibers that show how many weak strands can make one strong line.
